articles.title: OpenAI co-founder Andrej Karpathy joins Anthropic’s pre-training team
articles.description: Pre-training is responsible for the large-scale training runs that give Claude its core knowledge and capabilities, according to the company. It's also one of the most expensive, compute-intensive phases of building a frontier model.

articles.title: The minimalist Light Phone teams up with Andrew Yang’s Noble Mobile, which pays you to stop doomscrolling
articles.description: "The Light Phone is designed to be used as little as possible," founder Joe Hollier told TechCrunch.

articles.title: Hackers have compromised dozens of popular open source packages in an ongoing supply chain attack
articles.description: The attacks are part of a wider campaign known as Mini Shai-Hulud, which has already compromised several open source projects and, in turn, developers and companies that use them.

articles.title: US cyber agency CISA exposed reams of passwords and cloud keys to the open web
articles.description: The federal cybersecurity agency left plaintext passwords in a spreadsheet uploaded to a public GitHub repository, per a report by independent journalist Brian Krebs.

articles.title: Apple announces Apple Intelligence powered accessibility feature updates
articles.description: Apple is introducing a feature to let Vision Pro control a compatible wheelchair with their eyes

articles.title: ‘Survivor’ stars Kyle Fraser and Kamilla Karthigesu introduce a goal-tracking app, Paprclip
articles.description: A new app from Survivor 48 winner Kyle Fraser and castmate Kamilla Karthigesu aims to turn goal tracking into a social experience, pairing users for accountability, daily challenges, and shared progress clips.

articles.title: Forget the feed: Status AI raises $17M to turn social media into interactive entertainment
articles.description: Interactive social media site Status announced Tuesday $17 million in combined seed and Series A funding, with investors including General Catalyst, YC, LightShed Ventures, and Abstract.

articles.title: Stilta raises $10.5M from a16z and YC to help companies rediscover the patents they forgot they had
articles.description: Stilta announced Tuesday a $10 million seed round led by Andreessen Horowitz. Other investors in the round include YC and operators from companies like OpenAI, Legora, and Lovable.

articles.title: Solar to dominate energy by 2035, but AI data centers will keep fossil fuels in business
articles.description: Costs for solar panels are expected to drop another 30% in the coming decade, helping the tech cement its lead in energy markets.

articles.title: Theo Baker spent four years investigating Stanford. Before he leaves, here’s what he found.
articles.description: "There's a common refrain among [young] people in this world that it's easier to raise money for a startup right now than to get an internship. Which is remarkable, right?"

articles.title: OSHA probing worker death at SpaceX’s Starbase site
articles.description: The death is the latest worker safety issue at the Starbase facility, which has a higher injury rate than all other SpaceX sites.

articles.title: SandboxAQ brings its drug discovery models to Claude — no PhD in computing required
articles.description: Other venture-backed companies like Chai Discovery and Isomorphic Labs have raced to build better models. SandboxAQ is betting that access is the bigger obstacle and that Claude solves it.

articles.title: Anthropic has acquired the dev tools startup used by OpenAI, Google, and Cloudflare
articles.description: Stainless, a New York-based startup, founded in 2022, rose to prominence in the emerging AI industry for automating the creation and maintenance of software development kits, or SDKs — the libraries developers use to interact with APIs.

articles.title: Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI
articles.description: Elon Musk's claim that he was mistreated by his OpenAI co-founders failed after nine California jurors decided in a unanimous verdict that his lawsuits had been filed too late.

articles.title: NYC Health + Hospitals says hackers stole medical data and fingerprints during breach affecting at least 1.8 million people
articles.description: The New York public healthcare system said hackers stole personal and medical data, and scans of biometrics — including fingerprints — in one of the largest recorded breaches of 2026.

articles.title: Kin Health raises $9M to build an AI notetaker for patients
articles.description: The app is similar to a meeting notetaker — you can record doctor visits, and it will return an AI summary of the meeting, with the next steps, all of which you share with family and friends if you want to.

articles.title: Amazon’s new Alexa+ powered feature can generate podcast episodes
articles.description: Amazon’s Alexa+ can now generate custom AI podcasts on demand, as the company expands its assistant into a personalized AI content platform.

articles.title: Open source tool maker Grafana Labs says hackers stole its code, refuses to pay ransom
articles.description: The open source project said hackers stole its codebase and threatened to publish its source code if the company did not pay.

articles.title: South Korea’s LetinAR is building optics behind AI glasses
articles.description: A lens the size of a thumbnail — and the South Korean startup that makes it — could become the optical backbone of the AI glasses era.

articles.title: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats
articles.description: Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri.

articles.title: The era of 1,000 Hz gaming monitors has arrived, but why?
articles.description: LG's latest hits one frame per millisecond at a full 1080p resolution.

articles.title: EV drivers will pay $130 a year under Congress' 2026 transportation bill
articles.description: Politicians say they want EVs to pay "their fair share for the use of our roads."

articles.title: Civilization VII finally lets you build a civ that stands the test of time
articles.description: Civ 7 ’s devs talk walking back the game's most controversial decision.

articles.title: Electrical utility megamerger is all about the data centers
articles.description: NextEra’s blockbuster deal with Dominion likely means higher bills for consumers.

articles.title: In addition to space stations, Vast says it will now build high-power satellites
articles.description: "Every single successful space company is diversified in its products."

articles.title: Iran demands Big Tech pay fees for undersea Internet cables in Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: Iran's claim over subsea chokepoint pushes US tech companies to overland fiber.

articles.title: Ebola outbreak: WHO declares emergency, US restricts travel, American infected
articles.description: CDC is working to move the infected American and six others to Germany.

articles.title: Legal fail: Don’t use AI to sue Facebook users for calling you a bad date
articles.description: Fake citations dashed a dude’s “Are We Dating the Same Guy” revenge lawsuit.

articles.title: One Mars spacecraft, two senators, and a cloud of questions
articles.description: "I think there's plenty of fire lit under them already."

articles.title: Australian Aboriginals cared for a dingo's grave for decades
articles.description: For some ancient Aboriginal Australian communities, dingoes were part of the family.

articles.title: Elon Musk took too long to sue OpenAI, jury unanimously agrees
articles.description: Musk plans to appeal after judge immediately affirmed the jury's decision.

articles.title: Pompeii victim ID'd as a likely doctor
articles.description: New X-rays and CT scans showed small case with locking mechanism containing metal instruments.

articles.title: Guy Gardner makes a cameo in new Lanterns teaser
articles.description: "This ring? It's the greatest weapon in the Universe. When and if to use it, that's the whole ball game."

articles.title: The Dory Sign is E ink, smart screen simplicity at its finest
articles.description: Dory CEO claims the $149 signs won't be bricked should Dory go out of business.

articles.title: Five years later, Windows 11 brings back much-missed taskbar options (and more)
articles.description: Microsoft is also testing a smaller taskbar and more customizable Start menu.

articles.title: BMW sends off the 6th-gen M3 CS with a manual gearbox, rear-wheel drive
articles.description: The 2027 M3 CS Handschalter is lighter and comes with three pedals instead of two.

articles.title: Did Artemis II break through? Registrations at Space Camp double afterward.
articles.description: Isaacman's $25 million donation leads to impressive new facilities.

articles.title: Bug bounty businesses bombarded with AI slop
articles.description: "Never-ending" AI slop strains corporate hacking reward schemes.

articles.title: The US space enterprise is desperately waiting for Starship—will it finally deliver?
articles.description: "This is such a wild ride. The highs are high. The lows are low."

articles.title: A revolutionary cancer treatment could transform autoimmune disease
articles.description: Researchers are testing CAR T cell therapy as a way to reset the immune system.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **AI领域人才与竞争动态**：OpenAI联合创始人Andrej Karpathy加入Anthropic预训练团队；Anthropic收购了曾被OpenAI、Google等使用的开发者工具初创公司；马斯克起诉奥特曼及OpenAI的诉讼被驳回。
2. **网络安全事件频发**：黑客在持续供应链攻击中攻陷数十个热门开源包；美国网安机构CISA意外将大量密码和云密钥暴露在公开网络；纽约医疗系统遭黑客攻击，超180万人医疗数据和指纹泄露。
3. **科技与能源趋势**：报告预测太阳能将在2035年主导能源，但AI数据中心将使化石燃料继续被使用；SpaceX星舰基地发生工人死亡事件，正接受OSHA调查。
4. **新型应用与融资**：极简手机Light Phone联合杨安泽的Noble Mobile，通过付费减少用户“末日刷屏”；“幸存者”明星推出目标追踪应用Paprclip；Status AI获1700万美元融资，将社交媒体转化为互动娱乐；Stilta获1050万美元，助企业挖掘被遗忘的专利。
5. **苹果与AI医疗进展**：苹果发布由Apple Intelligence驱动的无障碍功能更新；SandboxAQ将其药物发现模型接入Claude，降低计算门槛。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：AI人才争夺与开源供应链安全威胁并行，同时数据泄露事件规模持续扩大，凸显科技行业在创新与安全之间的紧迫平衡。

Learn what happened, what was affected, and how OpenAI is strengthening defenses against evolving software supply chain threats.

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **多模态与检索模型更新**：Hugging Face 发布了多个新模型，包括 Ettin Reranker 排序模型系列、Granite Embedding Multilingual R2（支持32K上下文的多语言嵌入模型，最佳子亿参数检索质量），以及 PaddleOCR 3.5（集成 Transformers 后端，提升 OCR 和文档解析能力）。

2. **机器人视频生成与微调技术**：NVIDIA Cosmos Predict 2.5 支持使用 LoRA/DoRA 进行微调，用于机器人视频生成任务；同时 Hugging Face 推出开放智能体排行榜（Open Agent Leaderboard），推动智能体开发评估。

3. **企业级 AI 合作与部署**：OpenAI 与 Dell 合作将 Codex 引入混合云和本地企业环境；与马耳他政府合作向全体公民提供 ChatGPT Plus；Databricks 将 GPT-5.5 集成至企业智能体工作流，并发布多篇关于销售、运营、数据科学团队使用 Codex 的案例。

4. **AI 应用与交互体验升级**：ChatGPT 新增个人财务管理功能；Codex 支持随时随地协作开发；Sea 公司分享对基于 Codex 的智能体软件开发未来展望。

5. **异步批处理技术突破**：Hugging Face 发布关于连续批处理中实现异步性的技术方案，提升推理效率。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：OpenAI 与 Dell 合作将 Codex 引入企业私有化部署，标志着大模型从云端向混合/本地环境的深度渗透，结合多款企业级应用案例，AI 正加速进入各行业核心工作流。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **历史叙事与正义**：国际媒体强调东京审判对靖国神社错误历史观的纠正，重申中国在二战历史问题上的正义立场。
2. **科技与能源突破**：中国部署首个风能冷却海底数据中心，并新增相当于德国规模的电能容量，显示绿色能源与数字基建的领先发展。
3. **中美科技竞争与AI优势**：中国在人工智能、超级计算（如“LineShine”超算）及AI应用生态（如超级App、API市场）上持续突破，有效应对美国GPU出口限制，并展现效率优势。
4. **地缘经济与太空博弈**：中美俄三国在地球静止轨道（GEO）展开战略竞争；澳大利亚要求中国相关投资者出售北方矿业股份，反映资源领域的紧张态势。
5. **全球市场影响**：中国通过隐形机制影响全球石油市场，并利用本土供应链助力英特尔等企业降低笔记本电脑成本，显示中国制造业与市场的全球辐射力。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中国在AI与绿色能源领域的技术突破及产业链整合能力，正在重塑全球科技竞争格局，并对美国主导的技术封锁形成有效反制。
